seoTitle: Firefly vs Fishermans Paradise — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Firefly and Fishermans Paradise. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Firefly vs Fishermans Paradise: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Firefly and Fishermans Paradise.
heading: Firefly vs Fishermans Paradise — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Firefly, New South Wales and Fishermans Paradise, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fishermans Paradise has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Firefly (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Firefly or Fishermans Paradise safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Firefly has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Fishermans Paradise scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Firefly scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Fishermans Paradise scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Firefly or Fishermans Paradise?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fishermans Paradise has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
